title: Warsaw launches hybrid hub to reduce Europe’s reliance on Asian drug supply [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Fusing research and manufacturing, the hub aims to challenge Asian dominance, showing that pharmaceutical sovereignty lies as much in global supply chains as in lab capacity
summary_public: Fusing research and manufacturing, the hub aims to challenge Asian dominance, showing that pharmaceutical sovereignty lies as much in global supply chains as in lab capacity

PL.label: positive
PL.evidence: Warsaw launches hybrid hub to reduce Europe’s reliance on Asian drug supply
